name: export_frames_to_pdf
description: Export multiple frames as a single multi-page PDF file. Each frame becomes one page in order. Ideal for pitch decks, proposals, and slide exports.

nodeIds.description: Ordered list of frame node IDs to export as PDF pages, colon format e.g. '4029:12345'

outputPath.description: File path to write the PDF to, must end in .pdf (relative to working directory or absolute)
